summary: Verified customer sign-out flow after fix in /app/frontend/src/lib/auth-context.tsx (lines 62-71). Logged in as testsignout_1783230265@example.com, navigated to Account tab, tapped testID='signout-button'. App correctly navigated from /account to /login and both testID='login-email-input' and testID='login-password-input' are visible. Fix is working. Note: benign console warning 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated' from a library, not a functional issue.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Non-blocking; likely from a nested navigation/gesture library. Reference: appears during login submit.

action_items: None for the sign-out fix — verified working end-to-end for customer role.
Optional: silence 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated' warning by migrating any pointerEvents prop usages to style.pointerEvents (or update the offending dependency).
critical_code_review_comments: signOut in auth-context.tsx correctly handles supabase signOut errors in try/catch and always clears local state before navigation — good defensive pattern.
onAuthStateChange listener also clears profile when session is null (line 57), which complements the explicit setSession(null)/setProfile(null) in signOut. No double-state issues observed.
seed_data_creation: Reused existing account testsignout_1783230265@example.com created in previous iteration.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sign-out for CUSTOMER role verified. If future iterations need to test sign-out for other roles (admin, primary_seller, sub_seller), navigate to the equivalent account/settings screen — the signOut function is shared via useAuth() and should behave identically.
rca_of_issue: Previous iteration had a file-corruption artifact removing router.replace() from signOut. Main agent re-applied the fix cleanly. Verified in-file at lines 62-71 and confirmed at runtime via Playwright: URL transitions /account -> /login after tap.
